svg.title: Three-tier VPC traffic flow diagram
svg.desc: Traffic flow from the internet through an ALB, to the application tier, then the data tier, with NAT gateways providing outbound access from private subnets.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does internet traffic reach the VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is an Internet Gateway in AWS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Application Load Balancer distribute traffic?')
sendPrompt('What is a NAT Gateway used for?')
sendPrompt('What is a NAT Gateway used for?')
sendPrompt('What is a NAT Gateway used for?')

svg.text: Private subnets – application tier (AZ-a, AZ-b, AZ-c)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What runs in the application tier of a three-tier architecture?')
sendPrompt('What runs in the application tier of a three-tier architecture?')
sendPrompt('What runs in the application tier of a three-tier architecture?')

svg.text: Private subnets – data tier (AZ-a, AZ-b, AZ-c)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What database options work in the data tier of a VPC?')
sendPrompt('What database options work in the data tier of a VPC?')
sendPrompt('What database options work in the data tier of a VPC?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions deploy to AWS?')
sendPrompt('What does GitHub Actions do in a CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does CI/CD deploy to a VPC application tier?')
